SEARCH
Package com.falkordb

Interface Driver

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable
public interface Driver extends Closeable
An interface which aligned to FalkorDB Driver interface

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    configGet(String name)
    Gets the value of a FalkorDB configuration parameter.
    boolean
    configSet(String name, Object value)
    Sets the value of a FalkorDB configuration parameter.

    Returns a underline connection to the database

    Lists all available graphs in the database

    Lists all loaded UDF libraries.

    close

  • Method Details

    • graph

      GraphContextGenerator graph(String graphId)
      Returns a selected Graph
      Parameters:
      graphId - Graph name
      Returns:
      a selected Graph

    • getConnection

      redis.clients.jedis.Jedis getConnection()
      Returns a underline connection to the database
      Returns:
      a underline connection to the database

    • listGraphs

      List<String> listGraphs()
      Lists all available graphs in the database
      Returns:
      a list of graph names

    • udfLoad

      boolean udfLoad(String libraryName, String script, boolean replace)
      Loads a User Defined Function (UDF) library.
      Parameters:
      libraryName - The name of the UDF library
      script - The JavaScript code containing the UDF functions
      replace - Whether to replace an existing library with the same name
      Returns:
      true if the library was loaded successfully

    • udfList

      List<Object> udfList()
      Lists all loaded UDF libraries.
      Returns:
      a list of UDF library information

    • udfList

      List<Object> udfList(@Nullable String libraryName, boolean withCode)
      Lists UDF libraries with optional filters.
      Parameters:
      libraryName - Optional library name to filter results
      withCode - Whether to include the code in the response
      Returns:
      a list of UDF library information

    • udfFlush

      boolean udfFlush()
      Flushes all loaded UDF libraries.
      Returns:
      true if libraries were flushed successfully

    • udfDelete

      boolean udfDelete(String libraryName)
      Deletes a specific UDF library.
      Parameters:
      libraryName - The name of the library to delete
      Returns:
      true if the library was deleted successfully

    • configGet

      String configGet(String name)
      Gets the value of a FalkorDB configuration parameter.
      Parameters:
      name - The configuration parameter name (e.g., "RESULTSET_SIZE")
      Returns:
      The value of the configuration parameter as a String
      See Also:
      • GRAPH.CONFIG GET

    • configSet

      boolean configSet(String name, Object value)
      Sets the value of a FalkorDB configuration parameter.
      Parameters:
      name - The configuration parameter name (e.g., "RESULTSET_SIZE")
      value - The value to set
      Returns:
      true if the configuration was set successfully
      See Also:
      • GRAPH.CONFIG SET
